chapter_title.en: Instructions to the commander of a vanguard contingent dispatched to Syria

text: ومن وصيته له (عليه السلام) وصى بها شريح بن هانئ لما جعله على مقدمته إلى الشام

en.sayed-ali-raza: When Amīr al-mu’minīn placed Shurayḥ ibn Hānī (al-Madhḥijī) at the head of the vanguard preceding towards Syria, he issued this document of instruction to him.
